data.general: This period may bring unexpected changes in your life, Tula native. With Sun in the 9th house, you may experience a sense of restlessness and a desire for exploration. Be open to new experiences and learning opportunities.
data.luck: Your luck may seem to be turning in your favor, especially in your career and public life, as the Moon in the 10th house and Jupiter in the 10th house are in a harmonious position.
data.scope: Your scope for personal growth and expansion may be limited this period, as Saturn in the 6th house suggests a focus on practical, everyday matters. However, with the right approach, you can still achieve your goals.
data.study: With Mercury and Sun in the 9th house, you may find yourself drawn to learning and intellectual pursuits. This is a great time to engage in studies or explore new subjects that interest you.
data.love: Your love life may be influenced by Venus in the 11th house, which suggests a focus on relationships and partnerships that are outside of your immediate social circle. This could be a good time to explore new connections or deepen existing ones.
data.travel: Travel may be on the cards for you this period, as the 9th house is associated with journeys and exploration. With the Sun in the 9th house, you may feel a sense of wanderlust and a desire to see the world.
